mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: urinary urgency, dyspnea, reduced tendon reflexes, joint laxity, hepatosplenomegaly, myopathy, increased body weight, generalized lymphadenopathy, proximal lower limb muscle weakness, impaired tactile sensitivity

neurological symptoms including papiledema, cognitive decline, progressive pulmonary function impairment, episodic hypersomnia, self-injurious behavior, splenomegaly, hematochezia, follicular hyperplasia, calcific stippling, hemorrhagic diathesis
coarse facies, short stature, corneal cloudiness, hearing loss, cardiac involvement, respiratory issues, hepatosplenomegaly, hernias, skeletal changes, intellectual disability

renal symptoms such as proteinuria or microhematuria, angiokeratomas, acroparesthesias, hypertension, coronary artery disease, tachydysrhythmias, arrhythmogenic right ventricular cardiomyopathy, decreased circulating total IgA, chronic kidney disease

demyelinating neuropathy with early motor milestone regression, irritability, seizures, optic nerve damage, peripheral neuropathy, deafness, choreoathetosis, spastic paraplegia, scoliosis, delayed growth
muscular weakness, enlarged heart, liver, and spleen, feeding difficulties, poor suck, frequent respiratory infections, constipation, hypoglycemia, hepatitis, rhabdomyolysis
tall stature, long fingers, disproportionately long arms and legs, chest deformities, mitral valve prolapse, ectopia lentis, dural ectasia, pectus excavatum, scoliosis, osteopenia
epilepsy, mental retardation, facial angiofibomas, shagreen patches, unqual fibroma, adrenal tumors, retinitis pigmentosa, cardiac rhabdomyoma, gingival fibromas, hamartomas of the brain
coarsening of features, thickened lips, prominent ears, large tongue, short stature, bone age advancement, joint stiffness, kyphoscoliosis, carpal tunnel syndrome, learning problems
parkinsonism, pyramidal signs, extrapyramidal rigidity, tremors, dementia, cataracts, goiter, thyroid nodules, dental anomalies, basal ganglia calcifications
